scripts.postinstall: npm --prefix ui install && npm --prefix lambdas install
scripts.test: npm --prefix ui run test && npm --prefix lambdas run test
scripts.local:start: npm run local:backend:start && npm run local:terraform:init && npm run local:deploy && npm run local:terraform:env && npm run local:frontend:start
scripts.local:stop: npm run local:terraform:destroy && npm run local:frontend:stop && npm run local:backend:stop
scripts.local:restart: npm run local:stop && npm run local:start
scripts.local:deploy: npm run build:lambdas && npm run package:lambdas && npm run local:terraform:apply
scripts.local:backend:start: npm run local:compose:up:backend && npm run local:service:db:migrate
scripts.local:backend:stop: npm run local:compose -- stop postgres-db localstack wiremock db-migrate && npm run local:compose -- rm -f postgres-db localstack wiremock db-migrate
scripts.local:backend:restart: npm run local:backend:stop && npm run local:backend:start
scripts.local:frontend:stop: npm run local:compose -- stop ui && npm run local:compose -- rm -f ui
scripts.local:frontend:restart: npm run local:frontend:stop && npm run local:frontend:start
scripts.local:service:ui:start: npm run local:compose -- --profile frontend up -d ui
scripts.local:service:ui:stop: npm run local:compose -- stop ui && npm run local:compose -- rm -f ui
scripts.local:service:db:start: npm run local:compose -- --profile backend up -d postgres-db
scripts.local:service:db:stop: npm run local:compose -- stop postgres-db && npm run local:compose -- rm -f postgres-db
scripts.local:service:localstack:start: npm run local:compose -- --profile backend up -d localstack
scripts.local:service:localstack:stop: npm run local:compose -- stop localstack && npm run local:compose -- rm -f localstack
scripts.local:service:db:migrate: npm run local:compose -- --profile backend up --build db-migrate
scripts.local:compose:up:backend: npm run local:compose -- --profile backend up -d postgres-db localstack wiremock
scripts.local:compose:up:frontend: npm run local:compose -- --profile frontend up -d ui
